name: CITGO Asphalt Refining Co. v. Frescati Shipping Co.
question: Under federal maritime law, is a safe-berth clause in a voyage charter contract a guarantee of a ship’s safety or a duty of due diligence?
description: A case in which the Court held that under federal maritime law a safe-berth clause in a voyage charter contract is a guarantee of a ship’s safety, not merely a duty of due diligence.
